domain_types.name: ParamDeclaration
domain_types.description: A single parameter in a method signature, holding a name and its type string

domain_types.name: MethodDeclaration
domain_types.description: Structured method signature (L1 resolution) with name, receiver, params, returns, and async flag

domain_types.name: MemberDeclaration
domain_types.description: Composite type member: either an enum variant (Variant) or a struct field (Field)
